titleStmt.title: SII 23.594: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 594. (A.R. No. 594 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah district Saumyanātha temple—On the south wall of the same Tiruchchuṟṟumāḷigai Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya (II). Year 17

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Nandana Mīna, śu. 5. Saturday, Rōhiṇī, which would correspond to A.D. 1293, March 14.

This records the formation of a garden called Māṉaparipālan tiruttōppu at Nirandaṉūr in the name of minister Toṇḍaimāṉār of Tirunelvēli and an endowment of land as jīvita for the maintenance of the persons looking after it, for the benefit of god Śokkapperumāḷ at Nirandanūr, by Karumāṇikka-Āḻvāṉ alias Nandivarman the headman of Śiṟumali residing at Toḻūr in Toḻūr-nāḍu a division of Maṇavir-kōṭṭam in Jayangoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. These dāsa-nambis of the garden were to supply flower garlands to the temple daily in addition to 75 palam of vegetables grown on a plot specially set apart for the purpose. For the 20 paṇam received by the temple from these persons, two nāḻi of offered rice was to be given to them every day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . to ṇḍamān sacivo jīyā dudyānam yasya śāsanāt . śrīmat sundareśasya nirmitannandivarmaṇā . Undyānamakarodaccam nandivarmā mahāyaśā mānapālana mantriśaśśāsanāa sundareśituḥ .
svasti śrī . koccaṭavarmarāna tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇḍya devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7- Āvatāna nandaṉasamvaasarattu minanāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu pañcamiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rohiṇi
nāḷ Atirājendramaṇḍalattu meṟpākka nāṭṭu nirantaṉūrāṉa Akarabrahmade yam śrīkulottuṅka coḻac caturvetimaṅkalattu śrīkulottuṅka coḻa viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ cokka
p perumāḷukku tirunelveliyuṭaiyārāṉa toṇṭaimāṉār perāl Ivvūril ceyvikkiṟa māṉaparipālaṉ tiruttoppukkut tevaiceyyu nda . sanampimārukku jīvitamaṭaittapaṭi muṉṉāḷ
tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattil Aracampūṭṭaiyil dāsanampimāril tiruvaṉan=tāḻ vāṉukkum tampaṉukkum tevap perumāḷ makaṉ cokkaṉuḷḷiṭṭārk kum jivitamāka Aṭaitta nilam Ā
ṟaraikkālum Ivarkaḷ palarkkum bhogyādhiyum Uḻavaṭaiyum vaittu Etiraṭiyai vāṅkukaiyil Ivarkaḷiṭṭa tiṭṭuppaṭi paṇaṅkaḷukku muppatu paṇamāka tirntu kuṭuttu niṉṟa paṇaṅkaḷ
cokkapperumāḷukku Udakam paṇṇivittu bhogyādhiyum Uḻavaṭaiyu miṭṭu kaḻittu jivitamāka matittu nilam Ittoppu Iṭukaiyil Ivarkaḷukkutevai ceyya
coṉṉamaiyālum tirumālaiyum kaṟiyamutum tevaiyum naṭakka veṇ ṭukaiyālum putukkuṭiyāka Aṭainta per rum dāsaṉ tevapperu māḷum Ittiruvaṉantāḻvāṉum tampaṉum�
cokkaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum Ittiruttoppuc ceytu tirumālaiyum Eṭuttuk kaṟiyamutum Iṭak kaṭavarkaḷākavum kaṟiyamutu Iṭum Iṭattu Ittirut toppil vaṭamelai mulaiyil Āṟukuḻi kaṟiyamu
tukkām payirc ceytu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eḻupattaimpalamāka vatta kaṟi yamutu tirumaṭaip paḷḷiyile Iṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku Iv varacam pūṭṭaiyil nilam Āṟaraikkālu
m bhogyādhiyum Uḻavaṭaiyum Imuṉpukāṇiyuṭaiya tiruvaṉantāḻvā ṉukkum tampaṉukkum cokkaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum jivitamākavum putuk kuṭiyāṉa periyārkkum dāsaṉ tevapperumāḷuk
kum jivitattukkuṭalāka cokkap perumāḷ koyilil Oṭukkiṉa paṇam 2 10 Ippaṇam Irupatil palicaik kuṭalāka Ivarkaḷukku Ikkoyilil prasādattile Irunāḻi prasādam Iṭak
kaṭavatākavum Itu tevai tiruppakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi It tiruttoppuc ceyyumiṭattu Ivvūr mahājaṉattukkeṟak kuṭik kuṟṟappaṭāmal ceyyak kaṭavatākavu
m kuṭikkuṟṟa māṟik kuṭiyum vaittu Ittiruttoppuc cey vikkakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku I jivitamāṉa nilamum Ippalicai yāl vanta prasādamum Ivarkaḷukku ca[ṅrādityava]
rai cellakkaṭavatāka viṭṭeṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇa viṟkoṭṭattut toḻur nāṭṭut toḻurc ciṟumalikiḻāṉ karu māṇikka Āḻvāṉāṉa nandiparmanen
Digital edition of SII 23.594 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
